name: Gunnison Savings and Loan Association
description_short: FDIC-insured savings and loan association based in Gunnison, Colorado, offering deposit accounts, mortgage loans, and credit card products to local and online customers.
description_long: Gunnison Savings & Loan Association is a traditional savings and loan institution headquartered in Gunnison, Colorado, with a physical location at 303 N Main Street. The institution has been serving customers through both in-person banking and online channels, maintaining a straightforward community-focused approach to financial services. The company offers FDIC-insured deposit accounts designed to protect customer funds with full backing of the U.S. Government. Their primary loan products include mortgage financing for home purchases, refinancing, and construction projects. They also issue Rewards Visa Platinum Credit Cards to qualified customers. Online banking services are available, and customers can access ATM services at their main location. Gunnison Savings & Loan distinguishes itself as a local institution with direct phone access to specialized departments—separate lines for savings and loan divisions allow customers to reach appropriate departments quickly. Their deposit rates are published and available for comparison, and they maintain traditional banking hours (Monday-Friday, 8:30am-4:30pm) at a single physical location, emphasizing personal service over chain banking. The company appears best suited for Colorado residents seeking mortgage products or those in the Gunnison area wanting personalized banking relationships. However, the single location and limited online information about product specifics, rates, and current promotional offerings means customers will need to contact them directly for detailed pricing and availability. The website provides basic information but lacks comprehensive details about deposit account types, mortgage terms, credit card benefits, or competitive rate comparisons.
services: Online banking platform and account management
pros: FDIC insurance backing provides full U.S. Government protection for deposits
Separate specialized departments (Savings and Loan) with direct phone lines for faster service routing
Offers mortgage products for building, purchasing, and refinancing scenarios
Online banking platform available for remote account access and management
Issues Rewards Visa Platinum Credit Cards with incentive benefits
Published deposit rates available for customer comparison
ATM access at main location for convenient cash withdrawal
cons: Single physical location in Gunnison, Colorado limits accessibility for non-local customers
Website lacks specific information about product rates, terms, and competitive details
Limited online transparency about deposit account types, features, and minimum balances
No visible information about mortgage rates, loan terms, APRs, or credit card rewards structure
Restricted hours (8:30am-4:30pm weekdays only) may not accommodate all customer schedules
best_for: Gunnison, Colorado residents seeking local banking relationships and mortgage financing
Homebuyers and refinancers in Colorado looking for traditional savings and loan services
Customers prioritizing FDIC-insured deposit protection at a community-oriented institution
diagnosis: Gunnison Savings & Loan is best for Colorado residents, particularly those in the Gunnison area, seeking traditional mortgage lending and FDIC-insured deposit accounts with personalized service. The main caveat is the lack of detailed online pricing information and a single physical location, requiring interested customers to contact them directly for current rates, terms, and specific product details.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
meta_description: FDIC-insured savings and loan association in Gunnison, Colorado offering deposit accounts, mortgage loans, and credit cards.
